headline: A compact command center for the Royals season

latest_prospect_update.name: Blake Mitchell
latest_prospect_update.note: Most obvious remaining minor-league prospect to track; catcher development and power/patience are the main signals. Recent line: .083 / .258 / .125.

nightly_recap: The Royals lost to the Chicago White Sox, KC 5, CWS 6. Bobby Witt Jr. led the night, 1-3 | HR, 2 BB, K in the latest Royals game. Carter Jensen supplied the loudest Royals contact at 110.9 mph.

player_of_game.name: Bobby Witt Jr.
player_of_game.reason: 1-3 | HR, 2 BB, K in the latest Royals game.
